messages.content: Spice Island All Inclusive

Spice Island Beach Resort is an all-inclusive luxury resort located on the beautiful Grand Anse Beach in Grenada. This award-winning resort offers guests a truly unforgettable experience with its luxurious accommodations, gourmet dining options, and top-notch service.

The resort features 64 elegantly appointed suites, all of which are spacious and beautifully designed with Caribbean-style décor. Each suite offers a private patio or balcony, perfect for enjoying the breathtaking views of the crystal-clear waters and white sandy beach.

Spice Island Beach Resort is renowned for its culinary offerings, with two on-site restaurants serving up a wide array of delicious dishes. Guests can indulge in gourmet cuisine at Oliver's Restaurant, which offers a menu inspired by the flavors of the Caribbean and international cuisine. There is also the Sea and Surf Terrace & Bar, where guests can enjoy a casual, al fresco dining experience with stunning ocean views.

In addition to its stunning beachfront location and exquisite dining options, Spice Island Beach Resort also boasts a range of amenities and activities to ensure guests have a truly unforgettable vacation. The resort offers a full-service spa, fitness center, and swimming pool for guests to relax and rejuvenate. For those seeking adventure, there are plenty of water sports activities available, such as snorkeling, kayaking, and paddleboarding.

The all-inclusive package at Spice Island Beach Resort includes all meals and drinks, including premium brands, as well as a range of other services and activities. Guests can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, non-motorized water sports, tennis, and daily afternoon tea. The resort also offers a complimentary kid's club, making it a great choice for families.

Whether you're looking for a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or just a relaxing beach holiday, Spice Island Beach Resort provides the perfect setting for an unforgettable all-inclusive experience in Grenada.
Royalton Grenada

Royalton Grenada is a luxurious all-inclusive resort located on the beautiful shores of Magazine Beach in Grenada. This 5-star resort offers guests a high level of comfort and service, along with a range of amenities and activities for a truly memorable vacation.

The resort features beautifully designed and spacious rooms and suites, all equipped with modern amenities and stylish furnishings. Whether you choose a room with a garden view, ocean view, or direct swim-out access, each accommodation option provides a private balcony or terrace to enjoy the stunning views and Caribbean breeze.

Royalton Grenada offers a variety of dining options, including both buffet and à la carte restaurants. Guests can indulge in international cuisine at the Gourmet Marché buffet, savor delicious Italian dishes at Grazie Italian Trattoria, or experience the flavors of the East at the Zen Teppanyaki & Sushi Bar. There are also several bars and lounges throughout the resort where guests can enjoy a wide selection of premium beverages.

The resort offers an array of amenities and activities to keep guests entertained and relaxed during their stay. Lounge by the pool or on the beautiful white sand beach, or take advantage of the resort's water sports activities such as snorkeling, kayaking, and paddleboarding. For those seeking relaxation, the on-site spa offers a range of treatments and services to rejuvenate the mind, body, and soul.

For families traveling with children, Royalton Grenada offers a supervised kids club and a teen club to keep younger guests entertained. There are also multiple pools, including a dedicated kids pool, and a splash park equipped with water slides for endless fun in the sun.

The all-inclusive package at Royalton Grenada includes all meals and drinks, including premium alcoholic beverages, as well as 24-hour room service. Guests can also enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, non-motorized water sports, and access to the fitness center and tennis courts.

With its stunning beachfront location, luxurious accommodations, and abundance of amenities, Royalton Grenada is the perfect choice for a luxurious all-inclusive vacation in Grenada.

Spice Island All Inclusive

Spice Island Beach Resort is a luxury all-inclusive resort located on Grand Anse Beach in Grenada. The resort is known for its exceptional service, beautiful accommodations, and diverse dining options.

Hotel Class: Luxury

Star Rating: 5 stars

Distance from airport: Approximately 5.7 kilometers from Maurice Bishop International Airport

Rooms: The resort offers 64 suites, including the Anthurium Pool Suites, Oleander Superior Garden Suites, Seagrape Beach Suites, and Luxury Almond Pool Suites.

Room price range (per person, per night): Prices vary depending on the room type, season, and availability. It is recommended to check the resort's official website or contact them directly for the most current pricing.

Free WiFi: Complimentary WiFi is available throughout the resort.

24-hour room service: Yes, 24-hour room service is available.

Restaurants: The resort features two restaurants: Oliver's Restaurant, offering a range of international and Caribbean-inspired cuisine; and Sea and Surf Terrace & Bar, which provides casual dining and ocean views.

Bars: There is one bar at the resort, the Sea and Surf Terrace & Bar, offering a variety of beverages.

Pools: The resort has a freshwater swimming pool.

Nearby Golf: The resort is located near the Grenada Golf & Country Club, which is about 10 kilometers away.

Neighboring Resort: The resort does not have a directly neighboring resort, but it is surrounded by other hotels and accommodations along Grand Anse Beach.

Number of weddings per day: The resort can host multiple weddings per day, depending on availability and arrangements.

Wedding Venues: Spice Island Beach Resort offers several wedding venue options, including beachfront ceremonies, garden settings, and more.
Grand Velas Riviera Maya

Grand Velas Riviera Maya is a luxurious all-inclusive resort located in the stunning Riviera Maya region of Mexico. Known for its exceptional service, upscale accommodations, and world-class dining options, this resort offers an unforgettable vacation experience.

Hotel Class: Luxury

Star Rating: 5 stars

Distance from airport: Approximately 30 kilometers from Cancun International Airport.

Rooms: The resort offers a range of accommodations, including Grand Class Suites, Ambassador Suites, and Zen Grand Suites, with options for oceanfront, jungle, or pool views.

Room price range (per person, per night): Prices vary depending on the room type, season, and availability. It is recommended to check the resort's official website or contact them directly for the most current pricing.

Free WiFi: Complimentary WiFi is available throughout the resort.

24-hour room service: Yes, 24-hour room service is available.

Restaurants: Grand Velas Riviera Maya is renowned for its culinary offerings, featuring several award-winning restaurants. The resort has multiple gourmet restaurants specializing in Mexican, French, Italian, Asian, and international cuisine, as well as seafood and grill options.

Bars: The resort boasts several bars and lounges where guests can enjoy a variety of beverages and cocktails.

Pools: Grand Velas Riviera Maya features multiple pools, including infinity pools, adults-only pools, and family-friendly pools.

Neighboring Resort: The resort is not directly connected to neighboring resorts, but there are other hotels and accommodations in the Riviera Maya area.

Number of weddings per day: The resort has the capacity to host multiple weddings per day, depending on availability and arrangements.

Wedding Venues: Grand Velas Riviera Maya offers various stunning venues for wedding ceremonies and receptions, including beachfront locations, garden settings, and elegant indoor spaces.
